description_long: This is a British Rail diesel locomotive, characterized by its elongated, rectangular body and distinctive yellow ends. The locomotive features a dark gray upper body with a lighter gray lower section, separated by a thin red stripe, and displays the British Rail double arrow logo on each side. The roof is equipped with several circular vents, indicating the presence of powerful internal machinery. The sides have multiple small, rectangular windows and grilles, likely for ventilation and crew visibility. The undercarriage is detailed with visible wheels, suspension, and coupling mechanisms at both ends. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for hauling passenger or freight carriages on mainline railways.
description: A British Rail diesel locomotive with yellow ends, dark gray body, and detailed undercarriage, featuring side windows and vents. It is robust and designed for mainline rail use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow cab face, central headlight, and coupling mechanism.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, British Rail logo, windows, vents, and undercarriage details.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with a yellow cab face and coupling mechanism.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with logos, windows, vents, and undercarriage.
